name: Patricia Highsmith

acts.description: Documented virulent anti-Semitism and racism expressed in diaries and personal correspondence
Documented cruelty to former lovers and associates, keeping lists of enemies

behavior_summary: Author of some of the 20th century's most compelling psychological suspense novels, whose private diaries revealed extreme anti-Semitism, racism, and personal cruelty.

art.summary: Master of psychological suspense. Ripley is one of the great antiheroes in fiction. Carol was groundbreaking queer fiction at a time when that was genuinely dangerous.

accountability_events: 2021 posthumous diaries published revealing extent of her views

verdict.blurb: She wrote Carol — one of the great lesbian love stories — while privately recording monstrous views about Jewish people and others. Ripley is a sublime creation. Her diaries are a nightmare. She kept lists of people she hated. You might have been on one.
